Task description (task.json lines 4-5), export_result.sh line 108 file list validation, verifier.py lines 46-50 file existence checks

privileged_info_summary: BBBC005 is a published simulated dataset from the Broad Bioimage Benchmark Collection containing 19,200 synthetic fluorescence microscopy images (696 × 520 pixels, 8-bit TIF) generated using the SIMCEP simulator platform. The task uses a specific well (A01) with specific imaging parameters (t15_p01) to test Jaccard Index (Intersection over Union) calculation on two stains (w1 for cell body, w2 for nuclei). The methodology is verified: Otsu thresholding is applied to both channels, followed by AND (intersection) and OR (union) operations using Fiji's Image Calculator, with outputs saved to ~/Fiji_Data/results/jaccard/ as binary TIF masks and a CSV file containing the Jaccard Index calculation. Ground truth validation uses scikit-image's threshold_otsu function to independently recalculate the expected Jaccard Index from the same input images.
